title: The Adventures of Nick & Willikins

notes: It had some graphical issues, but everything works perfectly when you use Wine D3d11 with the following launch options: "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%".
title: The Adventures of Nick & Willikins

notes: It had some graphical issues related to text not displaying correctly and some graphical stuff not displaying at all, but everything works perfectly when you use Wine D3d11 with the following launch options: "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%".
title: The Adventures of Nick & Willikins
